title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Nexus Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
